description: A type confusion vulnerability exists on V8's JS-to-Wasm boundary because `JSToWasmObject` in `src/wasm/wasm-objects.cc` checks only canonical subtyping and ignores exactness for custom descriptors. That allows a descriptor object to cross the boundary as an exact supertype even when it is only a subtype, which in turn permits invalid described-struct instantiation and downcasts between unrelated Wasm types. The resulting type confusion can be exploited for arbitrary caged writes within the sandbox.

fixes.description: Local patch exported from https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/v8/v8/+/6973586 for reproducible fixed-image builds.
